category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Canadian market.

title.en: China-to-Canada LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Canadian electrical safety certification, ISED ICES EMC obligations, NRCan energy efficiency rules for covered lighting products, and English/French labelling expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与加拿大电气安全认证、ISED ICES 电磁兼容义务、适用于受管制照明产品的 NRCan 能效规则以及英法双语标签要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與加拿大電氣安全認證、ISED ICES 電磁相容義務、適用於受管制照明產品的 NRCan 能效規則以及英法雙語標籤要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SCC accreditation determination, ISED compliance determination, NRCan energy efficiency determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current federal, provincial, territorial, and Quebec-specific requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SCC 认可判定、ISED 合规判定、NRCan 能效判定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行联邦、省、地区及魁北克特定要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SCC 認可判定、ISED 合規判定、NRCan 能效判定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行聯邦、省、地區及魁北克特定要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer entering Canada should plan for Canadian electrical safety approval through an SCC-accredited certification body using the CSA C22.2 No. 250 series or the applicable Canadian national standard; ISED compliance for interference-causing equipment under ICES requirements; NRCan energy efficiency reporting and marking where the product is a covered lamp or contains a regulated lamp; and English/French consumer-facing labelling, with French prominence checked for Quebec. China CCC, GB 7000.1, China RoHS, and Chinese-language reports do not replace Canadian certification, Canadian importer responsibility, or bilingual labelling.
answer_first.zh: 进入加拿大市场的中国 LED 灯具制造商应规划：通过 SCC 认可的认证机构按 CSA C22.2 No. 250 系列或适用加拿大国家标准完成加拿大电气安全批准；按 ICES 要求满足 ISED 对干扰产生设备的合规义务；当产品属于受管制灯或含受管制灯时，满足 NRCan 能效申报和标识要求；并提供英法双语消费者标签，且针对魁北克核查法语显著性。中国 CCC、GB 7000.1、中国 RoHS 及中文报告不能替代加拿大认证、加拿大进口商责任或双语标签。
answer_first.zht: 進入加拿大市場的中國 LED 燈具製造商應規劃：通過 SCC 認可的認證機構按 CSA C22.2 No. 250 系列或適用加拿大國家標準完成加拿大電氣安全批准；按 ICES 要求滿足 ISED 對干擾產生設備的合規義務；當產品屬於受管制燈或含受管制燈時，滿足 NRCan 能效申報和標識要求；並提供英法雙語消費者標籤，且針對魁北克核查法語顯著性。中國 CCC、GB 7000.1、中國 RoHS 及中文報告不能替代加拿大認證、加拿大進口商責任或雙語標籤。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Canadian regulator, SCC accreditation source, CSA Group standards page, ISED interference-causing equipment standard, NRCan energy efficiency source, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. SCC-accredited certification scope, ICES issue/version, NRCan covered-product status, and bilingual labelling requirements must be re-verified on each review cycle.
